apis.description: 출발/도착지 및 최대 5개의 경유지, 기타 설정을 통해 최적화된 경로 탐색 정보를 반환합니다
출발/도착지 및 최대 5개의 경유지, 기타 설정을 통해 탐색된 요약 정보를 반환합니다
출발, 도착 예정시간을 기준으로 예상 도착시간 및 출발지와 목적지 (경유지 옵션) 좌표를 이용하여 탐색된 상세 정보와 경로 정보를 반환합니다
출발지, 도착지 및 최대 100개의 경유지와 각종 옵션을 설정하여 최적화된 경로 탐색 결과를 반환합니다
출발/도착지 및 최대 5개의 경유지, 기타 설정을 통해 최적화된 도보/PM 경로 탐색 정보를 반환합니다

| resultCode | message |
|-----------:|---------|
| 100 | Result Not Found |
| 101 | Argument Error |
| 102 | IMPS Server Error |
| 300 | Authentication Failed |
| 301 | Inappropriate URL |
| 400 | Invalid request parameter or body |

| 409 | Request conflict |
| 415 | Unsupported content type |
| 500 | Internal Server Error |
| 501 | Navigation Fail |
| 502 | Apply Smart Re-navigation |
| 503 | Canceled navigation by user |
| 504 | Error due to Checksum |
| 505 | Navigation fails for all routes |
| 510 | Wrong Parameter |
| 517 | Memory allocation failure |
| 518 | File open failure |

| 520 | File write failure |
| 521 | Socket connection failure |
| 532 | Request parameter is invalid |
| 533 | The starting point is not selected, or the wrong starting point |
| 534 | Destination is not selected or wrong destination |
| 535 | Wrong stopover |
| 536 | Link Projection failure |
| 537 | Exceeding the navigational distance (1000km, walking navigation: 20km) |
| 538 | Exceeds the number of expandable nodes |
| 539 | Expansion failure |
| 540 | Expansion failure due to inactivity or traffic control |
| 541 | Expansion failure due to vehicle height/weight restrictions near the starting point |
| 542 | Expansion failed due to a part-time curfew near the departure point |
| 543 | The destination is a physical island road, and there are no established ferry routes |
| 544 | The departure or destination is a logical (transportation) island, and there are more than one destination |
| 548 | node Heap Size is Max |
| 549 | node does not exist (Search FW)  |
| 550 | node does not exist (Search FW in Main Loop RoutePlanL) |
| 551 | node does not exist (Search BW) |
| 552 | node does not exist (Search BW in Main Loop RoutePlanL) |
| 553 | node does not exist (searchOnedirection) |
| 554 | node does not exist (searchOnedirection in Main Loop) |
| 555 | In check_force_restriction_fw, when there is no restriction on the progress direction && Not direction search && HP_NOPASSING |
| 556 | When check_force_restriction_fw passes entry/exit restriction |
| 557 | In check_force_restriction_bw, the forward direction is backwards, the disadvantage of the bidirectional link is U-turn, when the entry/exit restriction is passed. |
